recommendations.title: The Volcano: Rescue from Whakaari
recommendations.overview: A close examination of the Whakaari / White Island volcanic eruption of 2019 in which 22 lives were lost, the film viscerally recounts a day when ordinary people were called upon to do extraordinary things, placing this tragic event within the larger

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Y Tu Mamá También
recommendations.overview: In Mexico, two teenage boys and an attractive older woman embark on a road trip and learn a thing or two about life, friendship, sex, and each other.

recommendations.title: We the Animals
recommendations.overview: Manny, Joel and Jonah tear their way through childhood and push against the volatile love of their parents. As Manny and Joel grow into versions of their father and Ma dreams of escape, Jonah, the youngest, embraces an imagined world all his own.

recommendations.title: Love Is Overrated
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed «crap with girls» by his friends, Anis’ love life has barely a pulse. Three years after the loss of Isma, his best friend and mentor, Anis takes his courage in both hands and decides finally to get out and meet people again. And the person

recommendations.title: Camp Rock
recommendations.genres: Music, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Mitchie gets a chance to attend Camp Rock, her life takes an unpredictable twist, and she learns just how important it is to be true to yourself.

recommendations.title: Burning Betrayal
recommendations.overview: Babi discovers a betrayal by her long-term partner and decides to embark on a new adventure in life. On this journey, she meets judge Marco and they begin to live a story permeated by a lot of sexual tension.

recommendations.title: Suzanne
recommendations.overview: The story of a family and a love affair told through the journey of a young woman called Suzanne.

recommendations.title: Summerland
recommendations.overview: A woman during the Second World War opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

recommendations.title: Looks That Kill
recommendations.overview: A teenager lives out the hilarious and often tragic consequences of being lethally attractive, until he meets a girl with a congenital defect.
